author: nflaig
content:
there are a lot of payloads produced by Nimbus EL with invalid withdrawals

  expected=0xe037022065743b8388dab479c0ba903d6dc28ee8c3eda4bcaf5e84eca91e0d0b

cc <@654267572107083777>

author: tersec
content: can't be all of it, because that would be running on the fleet by now. The fix hasn't been written yet, but we know generally the issue

author: nflaig
content: so his fix might just cover `blob gas used mismatch`, not the withdrawals mismatch

author: tersec
content: fix pending (it won't be written by me, so I can't say precisely when, but it is pending and not a deep mystery)

author: nflaig
content: last blob gas used mismatch was 2026-07-03 17:30:12 UTC ~18h ago, so that might be fixed already then

author: tersec
content: that fits the  timeline -- 4405 merged directly into Nimbus's `glamsterdam-devnet-6` branch, which means the watchtower picked it up automatically

author: nflaig
content: can recheck once you have the withdrawals mismatch fix rolled out, should be fairly quick to confirm
